zh.lifeSummary: 當Gaulter Somerville於大約1071年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾維諾時，他的父親Sir Gaulter De Sommerville Lord Of Wichenour42歲，母親CICILLY DE LUNSIE40歲。他於大約1110年與Cecily de Lunsie在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾維其諾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1165年在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gaulter Somerville于大约1071年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾維諾时，他的父亲Sir Gaulter De Sommerville Lord Of Wichenour42岁，母亲CICILLY DE LUNSIE40岁。他于大约1110年与Cecily de Lunsie在英国英格兰斯塔福爾維其諾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1165年在英国苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Gaulter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

en.lifeSummary: When Gaulter Somerville was born about 1071, in Wychnor, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Gaulter De Sommerville Lord Of Wichenour, was 42 and his mother, CICILLY DE LUNSIE, was 40. He married Cecily de Lunsie about 1110, in Wichnor, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1165, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gaulter Somerville est né environ 1071, à Wychnor, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Gaulter De Sommerville Lord Of Wichenour, avait 42 ans et sa mère, CICILLY DE LUNSIE, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Cecily de Lunsie environ 1110, à Wichnor, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1165, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gaulter Somerville um 1071 in Wychnor, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Gaulter De Sommerville Lord Of Wichenour 42 und seine Mutter CICILLY DE LUNSIE 40. Er hat um 1110 in Wichnor, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Cecily de Lunsie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1165 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gaulter Somerville è nato il circa 1071 nel Wychnor, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Gaulter De Sommerville Lord Of Wichenour, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, CICILLY DE LUNSIE, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Cecily de Lunsie circa 1110, nel Wichnor, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1165, nel Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gaulter Somervilleが約1071年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウイチノーで生まれた時，父Sir Gaulter De Sommerville Lord Of Wichenourは42歳，母CICILLY DE LUNSIEは40歳であった。約1110年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウィチノーでCecily de Lunsieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1165年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gaulter Somerville(이)가 대략 1071년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 윈이ch너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gaulter De Sommerville Lord Of Wichenour(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 CICILLY DE LUNSIE(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1110년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 위ch너에서 Cecily de Lunsie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1165년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gaulter Somerville nasceu aproximadamente 1071, em Wychnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Gaulter De Sommerville Lord Of Wichenour, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, CICILLY DE LUNSIE, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily de Lunsie aproximadamente 1110, em Wichnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1165, em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gaulter Somerville родился около 1071 г. в местности вичнор, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Gaulter De Sommerville Lord Of Wichenour было 42 года, а матери, которую звали CICILLY DE LUNSIE, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily de Lunsie около 1110 г. в местности вичнор, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1165 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gaulter Somerville nació aproximadamente 1071, en Wychnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Gaulter De Sommerville Lord Of Wichenour, tenía 42 años y su mamá, CICILLY DE LUNSIE, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Cecily de Lunsie aproximadamente 1110, en Wichnor, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1165, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 95 años.
